text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There really is nothing better than placing first!
I'm so happy I could burst!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Were you watching? Did you see me run?!
choice_data_list: I know you can do even better!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll drop by a cafe and treat myself to a
lemonade and tiramisu later.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're coming with me, aren't you? Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're coming with me, aren't you? Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, Trainer! That's not what I expected you
to say at all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, Trainer! That's not what I expected you
to say at all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But you're right! I can't be satisfied with that
performance! I wasn't fired up enough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Maruzensky downs her favorite orange
smoothie in one gulp!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that got my engine revving! I've just got to
keep up this pace and continue driving forward!
